title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Onboarding flow displays properly translated text for all supported languages in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
2. Observe the Onboarding flow screens (Welcome, Permissions, Device Setup, etc.).
3. Change the device system language to each supported language (e.g., English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, etc.).
4. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.

5. For each language, verify that all text elements on every Onboarding screen are displayed in the correct translated language (no untranslated English strings, no truncated or garbled text, no placeholder text).
expected: All Onboarding screens display properly translated text for each supported language, with no untranslated strings, truncation, or formatting issues.
